payload.answer: JSON payload prepared for memory ingestion. It preserves the ambiguity around the content of the 8000-word transcript and defers concrete extraction until the actual text is processed.
payload.decision: store_single_summary_card_with explicit memory_card(s) and entity resolutions; preserve ambiguity and avoid collapsing deprecated facts

entity_resolution.reason: No concrete named entities were extracted due to the abstract nature of the input; resolution will occur when the actual transcript is ingested and analyzed.

memory_cards.statement: An 8000-word transcript is proposed to be stored as a single conversation_summary card. The plan is to convert the transcript into a continuous memory card representing the entire dialogue, decisions, and context.

details: Prepared memory_card with placeholder entities and relationships tied to transcript length and storage format.
No factual assertions about the transcript content are made beyond the proposed structure.
